title: Pugmeowla's Time Walker Continuum
description: Time Walker Continuum is a Palladium-based addonpack for "Alien Evolution", which adds Time Walker abilities such as Professor Paradox's and Eon's.
body:
# **PLEASE USE "[Deus Chrono-Machina](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/deus-chrono-machina)" INSTEAD** # **I PORTED CLOCKWORK FROM THIS MOD TO THAT MOD AS TIMEWALKER IS PRETTY BUGGY, SO IF YOU WANT CLOCKWORK USE IT INSTEAD** ***

 

adds chronians, timewalkers (pardox) and chronosapiens :D (clockwork)

How to get chronian:

  1. find the hands of armageddon (structure)
  2. right click it
  3. this will summon eon and henchman, kill eon while the omnitrix is equipped
  4. this will scan the sample :)

How does the chronian work:

it is based on the ability bar, not timing out, you cant time out the bar is for the abilities, and does not regenerate. when the bar runs out, you detransform, the only way of preventing this is "reseting" the dna by manually detransforming and retransforming. this resets the bar. shift for some abilties

If you find the chrononav, you can also use it to teleport anywhere (explained in paradox section)

(In a future update, if you use up your bar too much, a counter will be added to count these, and eventually will cause you becoming a chronian permanently, not yet added to say again)

How to get paradox:

  1. craft the time tunnel
  2. right click it
  3. this clears ur inv and everything, stranding u in the inbetween, a blank dimension aside from the one structure, the chrononavigator
  4. you also get paradox powers, but without the chrononavigator, you cannot leave
  5. when you find the chrononav, you can use the command chrononav_tp (or soemthing i forgot 💀 ) to teleport back to the overworld, or any dimension, at any coords

Paradox abilities (beta)

teleport to where you look at teleport using command detransform any omnitrix users nearby time in omnitrix users nearby

How to get clockwork (chronosapien)

  1. find the chrononav via someone eles, or doing it yourself
  2. right click it while having the omnitrix equiped
  3. it will then scan it in

Clockworks powers:

None its not done yet 🤣 :index_pointing_at_the_viewer:

This should be everything, enjoy :D (if people ask questions, refer them to this)

FireBlast_27 - Clockwork and Eon Textures
